tab.title: Advertising banners
tab.description: Upload JPG, PNG, or WebP banners up to 2 MB.
tab.publicationRequiredNotice: Banner uploads, status changes, and reordering require a new catalog publication before they reach the scales.

notices.uploaded: Banner uploaded and added. Publish a new catalog version to push the change to the scales.
notices.statusChanged: Banner status updated. Publish a new catalog version to push the change to the scales.
notices.reordered: Banner order updated. Publish a new catalog version to push the change to the scales.

errors.csrf: Could not prepare the secured action. Try again.
errors.unsupportedFormat: Banner format is not supported. Upload JPG, PNG, or WebP.
errors.fileTooLarge: Banner file is too large. Upload an image up to 2 MB.
errors.statusFailed: Could not change the banner status.
errors.reorderFailed: Could not change the banner order.
